scripts.build: npm run build -w @pcu/contracts && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.testenv:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.integration.yml up --build -d && node scripts/smoke-integration.mjs
scripts.testenv:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.integration.yml down -v --remove-orphans && npm run testenv:up
scripts.test:integration: npm run testenv:up && docker compose -f docker-compose.integration.yml --profile e2e run --rm e2e
